examples: Suppose that Jerry marries Jeannette, who is a college graduate and is working.
Now, Jeannette has quit work and their first child is on the way.
Suppose that Jerry marries Jeannette who is a college graduate and is working.
Jeannette and I are pretty tight, thanks to my daily offerings of carrots, apples, and oat cookies.
Before she moved away, she sold me Jeannette, one of her oldest donkeys (they live to be thirty, even forty).
